records.pMessage: Tutorial Cruise
Find the Ghost Pirate Ship!
Subdue the Dragon!
The Sky Knights Attack!

Learn how to pilot an airship in this
practice course.

Attacks from a ghost pirate ship have
been on the rise. Hunt it down and
shiver its timbers!

A ferocious dragon has made the area
surrounding Mount Karka impassable.
Subdue it and secure safe passage!

Movements of the ducal forces are
raising concerns. Reconnoiter
their strength in Eternia!

Tutorial
Bonus

Flip the test switches
to <color=#b22222>{0}</color>, <color=#b22222>{1}</color>, and <color=#b22222>{2}</color>!

Thanks! Looks like
they’re working!

C’mon, Ringabel…
At least flip a switch.

Test, please. Switches
to <color=#b22222>{0}</color>, <color=#b22222>{1}</color>, and <color=#b22222>{2}</color>!

Thanks! Instruments
look to be in order.

Why…? It’s just a
simple test.

Hey, set the radio to
<color=#b22222>{0}</color>, ’kay?

Thanks! This is what
I wanted to hear!

But I wanted to listen
to that music…

Could you please play
<color=#b22222>{0}</color> on the radio?

Thank you! This music
is so relaxing.

I really like that
music. Too bad…

Could you set the
music to <color=#b22222>{0}</color>?

Thanks! Doesn’t
this sound great?

Aww, but it’s such
good music.

<color=#b22222>#{0}</color> fireworks, please.
A birthday’s on board.

Drat… Sorry to
have bothered ya.
It’s so pretty…

<color=#b22222>#{0}</color> fireworks, please.
A birthday’s on board.

Drat… Sorry to
have bothered ya.
They’re…beautiful…

Pyrotechnics test:
Hit the <color=#b22222>#{0} button</color>.

Well, so much for
that test.
It’s so pretty…

Pyrotechnics test:
Hit the <color=#b22222>#{0} button</color>.

Well, so much for
that test.
They’re…beautiful…

It’s warm in here.
Turn on the <color=#b22222>cooler</color>?

Ahh, that’s more
like it! …Thanks.

Mrgrgr! You trying
to roast me!?

We should turn the
<color=#b22222>A/C off</color> for now.

Thanks! Saving
energy is important!

It’s no good to let
it run all the time.

Brr… Could you
turn on the <color=#b22222>heater</color>?

Thank you. I thought
I might freeze.

I’ll catch my
death of cold!

Try blowing the
whistle <color=#b22222>{0}</color> times!

Thanks!
Wasn’t that fun?

I thought it would
cheer us up…

Incoming! Lock on
and fire the net!

Got ’em! They can’t
bother us now!

Whew, they went
somewhere else.

A weird bug flew
in! Kill it!

Thanks. They always
go after me.

Ack! It bit me!
It already itches!

Something bit me!
I can’t bear this…

It bit my—! And
now it’s swelling!?

Try tightening it
with that <color=#b22222>wrench</color>.

Ugh, never mind.
I’ll fix it!

Oh no! It’s
leaking steam!

That’s better. You
had me worried.

Eek! Is it supposed
to shake like this?

Replace the burnt
<color=#b22222>tube</color> with a new one.

Geez. Guess I’ll
take care of it.

Something’s broken!
Is it gonna blow!?

Whew! Just watching
had me nervous!

Whaaat! It really
did blow up!

やったぞ！　
もうすぐ目的地だ！

フッ、楽勝だったな。
多少、冷汗はかいたが…

もうすぐ目的地に到着です。
操縦の腕は本物でしたね！

まあな。俺にとっちゃ
このくらい朝飯前さ。

さすがリングアベル。
操縦の腕だけはたしかだね！

そうだろう？
操縦だけは…って、えっ？

船の出力が低下してる！
海に落ちるぞ！

Output’s dropping!
We’ll hit the sea!

Dragon spotted!
Raise the shields!

A galleon’s got us!
Ready the cannons!

幽霊船が現れたぞ！
聖なるハエたたきで応戦だ！

It’s the ghost ship!
Use the holy swatter!

Combine the shields
to reflect attacks!

Combine the shields
to reflect attacks!

回頭しはじめたぞ！
攻撃のチャンスだ！

It’s changed course!
Now’s our chance!
Now it is our turn!

It’s the whole fleet!
Focus on the galleon!

体当たりしてくる気！？
ぶつかる前に倒すよ！

It’s gonna ram us!?
We hafta sink it!

It’s slowed down!
Time to beat it!

Retreating!? You
won’t get away!

あ！ 消えた…
逃げられた…のかな？
怖かったですね…

Ah! It vanished!
Did it…get away?
That was scary…
It’s running away!

We survived…
somehow…

Phew… They
got away…
That was tough…
やった！　撃沈したぞ！

やりましたね！
きっとみなさん喜びます！

Hooray!
We sank it!

We did it! Everyone
will be so happy!

Wow! We really
beat it!

Fantastic piloting!
You did a great job.

Target destroyed.
Heh, no sweat.

Haha, but you’re
covered in sweat!

Ah! The balloons got
out! Just pop ’em all!
The Grandship Soars the Open Skies
Caldisla, Land of Beginnings
The Horizon: Endless Light and Shadow
Windswept Day
Hartschild, Town of Shieldbearers
Under the Banner of the Duchy
Grandship, the Sinking State
Ancheim, Land of Sand and Time
Hostile Descent
The Evil One
Love in the Crossfire! [Long Version]
The Ship Sails on the Open Seas
Under a Hollow Moon
A Trifling Affair
The Evil War
off
on

First rotate the wheel right
to yaw right. You can grab it
with either hand.

Give it another turn.
Grab the wheel and steer right.

Nice steering!
Next, try yawing to the left.

Give it another turn.
Grab the wheel and steer left.

Good, now try using the wheel
to fly through the rings.

Give it another go. Rotate the
wheel to head for the rings.

Amazing! It’s almost like this
isn’t your first time!

While holding the altitude lever,
move it down to descend.

Give it another try.
Pull it all the way down.

Pretty good!
Next try ascending.

One more time.
Pull the lever all the way up.
Good, just like that.

Next try flying through the rings
using both the wheel and the lever.

Let’s do that again.
Try to fly through the rings.

That’s it for the basics. I’d say you’ve
got all the makings of a great pilot!

Flip the switches on or off as
ordered, starting from the left.

One more time. As ordered,
flip them on or off,
starting from the left.

Way to go! Now give the
next order a try!

Grab the wrench from the box and
press the button over the valve.

Try it again. Close the
valve with the wrench.

Great!
We’re out of the woods.

Finally, try fulfilling an order
while flying through the rings.

One more time. While flying through
the rings, fulfill the order.

Fantastic! All sorts of orders will
come at you during the real thing.
Give ’em all a go.
